capabilities.name: governed_web_search
capabilities.description: Searches current web sources through the governed network path and returns a results widget with bounded follow-up actions.

capabilities.name: open_website
capabilities.description: Opens a requested website, source URL, or article page in the default browser through the governed local route.

capabilities.name: speak_text
capabilities.description: Reads text aloud through the local offline TTS path after speech-safe formatting removes raw links and system tokens.

capabilities.name: open_file_folder
capabilities.description: Opens allowed files or folders inside Nova-approved path roots through a confirmation-backed local navigation path.

capabilities.name: volume_up_down
capabilities.description: Raises, lowers, mutes, unmutes, or sets system volume on the local device through the governed media-control path.

capabilities.name: media_play_pause
capabilities.description: Starts, pauses, or resumes local media playback through platform-specific media controls on the current device.

capabilities.name: brightness_control
capabilities.description: Raises, lowers, or sets display brightness using platform-supported local controls on the active device.

capabilities.name: response_verification
capabilities.description: Verifies text or a prior answer for likely issues, corrections, and confidence without authorizing any action.

capabilities.name: external_reasoning_review
capabilities.description: Provides a same-thread governed second-opinion lane that can critique an answer without gaining execution authority.

capabilities.name: os_diagnostics
capabilities.description: Reports system health, resource status, model readiness, bridge state, and active capability/runtime diagnostics.

capabilities.name: multi_source_reporting
capabilities.description: Builds a structured multi-source report with findings, source credibility, counter-analysis, and decomposed confidence signals.

capabilities.name: headline_summary
capabilities.description: Summarizes selected headlines, compares headline clusters, and can read the linked story page when deeper detail is requested.

capabilities.name: intelligence_brief
capabilities.description: Builds a compact daily or topic intelligence brief from current headlines and related news clusters.

capabilities.name: topic_memory_map
capabilities.description: Shows a topic map of recurring themes in the latest headline set so users can see what the current news cycle clusters around.

capabilities.name: story_tracker_update
capabilities.description: Starts or refreshes tracked stories, links related stories, and stores new snapshots for comparison over time.

capabilities.name: story_tracker_view
capabilities.description: Shows tracked story timelines, comparisons, and relationship views for stories already being followed.

capabilities.name: analysis_document
capabilities.description: Creates session-scoped analysis documents, lists them, summarizes them, and explains specific sections on request.

capabilities.name: weather_snapshot
capabilities.description: Loads a weather snapshot and widget with a short summary, setup truth, and suggested next actions.

capabilities.name: news_snapshot
capabilities.description: Loads the current news snapshot and headline cache used by the News page and follow-up summary flows.

capabilities.name: calendar_snapshot
capabilities.description: Loads a calendar or agenda snapshot with connection truth, source label, and compact schedule guidance.

capabilities.name: screen_capture
capabilities.description: Captures and stores an explicit request-time screen snapshot for later explanation without creating any background capture loop.

capabilities.name: screen_analysis
capabilities.description: Runs OCR and visual analysis on an explicit screen capture and returns a bounded explanation of what was found.

capabilities.name: explain_anything
capabilities.description: Routes an explicit explain request to the best read-only explainer path for screen, page, or selected file context.

capabilities.name: memory_governance
capabilities.description: Saves, lists, edits, locks, defers, exports, and deletes explicit governed memory items and thread-linked memory.

capabilities.name: openclaw_execute
capabilities.description: Phase 8 canonical governed execution surface for OpenClaw home-agent templates. Runs a named read-only template through either the governed network path or a bounded local-read path and returns a structured result widget.

capabilities.name: send_email_draft
capabilities.description: Composes an email draft using the local LLM and opens it in the system mail client (mailto:). The user reviews and sends manually — Nova never transmits email autonomously. Requires explicit user confirmation before opening the mail client.
